goblin.description: Goblinoid monsters: the goblin warrens, raiders, and the amulet thief.

gooby.description: The gooby cave-beast family hunted around Nouraajd.

human.description: Humans, including the player-selectable Outlander, Highlander, and Wanderer peoples.

pritz.description: The pritz creature family, including the pritz mages.
